detail: One registry row should exist per model in the Stage 8 grid.
Model IDs must be unique in the model registry.
Admissible models should contribute one cohort-level row per horizon.
Admissible models should contribute one threshold row per horizon and threshold.
Every model should contribute one PPC row per horizon.
Each model-horizon key should appear at most once in the cohort-level table.
Each model-horizon-threshold key should appear at most once in the classification table.
Each model-horizon key should appear at most once in the PPC table.
Cohort-level output should retain screening, admissibility, and support metadata.
Threshold-based output should retain estimability and reporting metadata.
Bayesian-vs-no-cure comparison rows should retain horizon support metadata.
Diagnostic PDF should exist after the run, unless PDF generation was intentionally skipped.
